sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى شَرِكَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ لِإِجْرَاءِ مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je otišao u veliku kompaniju na razgovor za novi posao.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed went to a large company for a new job interview.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَرْتَدِي مَلَابِسَ رَسْمِيَّةً وَيَشْعُرُ بِالْقَلِيلِ مِنَ التَّوَتُّرِ.
sentences.translation: Nosio je formalnu odjeću i osjećao je malu nervozu.
sentences.translationEn: He was wearing formal clothes and felt a little nervous.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ وَتَحَدَّثَ عَنْ خِبْرَتِهِ السَّابِقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Odgovorio je na pitanja sa samopouzdanjem i pričao o svom prethodnom iskustvu.
sentences.translationEn: He answered the questions confidently and spoke about his previous experience.

sentences.arabic: فِي النِّهَايَةِ، شَكَرَ الْمُدِيرَ وَتَمَنَّى الْحُصُولَ عَلَى الْوَظِيفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju se zahvalio direktoru i ponadao se da će dobiti posao.
sentences.translationEn: In the end, he thanked the manager and hoped to get the job.
